units.name: Fiber & Core Infrastructure Unit
units.description: Handles entire building network blackouts, damaged fiber optic cables, structural switch failures, and core backbone links.

units.name: Helpdesk & LAN Routing Unit
units.description: Handles office LAN port faults, wall jack replacements, single system IP configuration conflicts, and localized Wi-Fi router issues.

units.name: Network Operations Center (NOC)
units.description: Handles institutional email access locks, departmental sub-domain setups, firewall white-listing, and server access exceptions.

tickets.title: Faculty of Science Lab 3 Link Failure
tickets.description: Entire row of computers in Lab 3 cannot obtain IP addresses.

logs.text: The students have an exam by 2 PM. Please look into this quickly.

tickets.title: Office LAN Port Fault in Faculty of Arts
tickets.description: The LAN wall outlet in Room 204 has been completely dead since yesterday. We have tried multiple network patch cables and systems, but there is no link light on the switch side.

tickets.title: Wi-Fi Router IP Conflict in Department of Chemistry
tickets.description: Users connecting to UI-CHEM-WIFI are getting IP conflict errors. The local router seems to be conflict-assigning IPs that overlap with the departmental static IP pool.

logs.text: Requires outdoor fiber splicing gear or advanced DHCP config, stepping down.

tickets.title: Issues with disconnected cables
tickets.description: We have issues with some disconneted cables making the wifi not reaching the department aymore
